name: zsnd_sample_set_registry_find_by_name
description: zSndSampleSetRegistry::FindByName searches the registered sample-set array for an exact set-name match.
known_limits: Functional-equivalent only; the current VC6 COFF byte comparison fails around the compiler's inlined strcmp/canonicalization shape, so Binary-safe remains false.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation at 0x4a0920 validates scanning [g_zSnd_SampleSetRegistry.begin..end), comparing each setName to the requested name, returning the first exact match, and returning null for an empty registry or no match.
The native smoke covers a two-entry registry, successful lookup of the second entry, and null return for a missing name.
